sampleTitles: Software Development Engineer, Selling Partner Financial Technology
Sr Software Dev Engineer III, RDS for Oracle

needsConnector.recommendation: HTML fallback is lower quality; keep for diagnostics or write a custom connector.
Structured sitemap samples lack specific job locations. Add a custom connector or better sitemap filter before promoting.

blockedOrFragile.recommendation: Google careers data is embedded in page payloads, but the current parser is not stable enough to promote without a custom connector.
Meta Careers has a prominent automated collection notice; keep it out of automated first-party ingestion until legal/robots handling is clarified.
